---
title: "Like another Helen: The History of the Cruel Misfortunes and Undeserved Distresses of a Young Lady of Virtue"
---

## Like another Helen: The History of the Cruel Misfortunes and Undeserved Distresses of a Young Lady of Virtue

**Author:** Sydney C. Grier
**Date:** 1894
**Imprint:** Edinburgh: Blackwood

### Notes

The novel was reprinted in 1899.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
